About Us

More Than Just Events

1UP Connect is a West Melbourne based community initiative dedicated to bringing young people together through sport, creativity, and meaningful conversation.

We believe that access to quality experiences shouldn't depend on your postcode. Whether you're into competitive sport, want to meet new people, or are going through a tough time — there's a place for you here.

From high-energy Padel and Futsal tournaments to mental health awareness sessions in local schools, everything we do is designed to help youth in Melbourne's west feel connected, supported, and energised.

⚡

Sport & Competition

Padel, futsal tournaments and more — open to all skill levels across West Melbourne.

🧠

Mental Health Awareness

School workshops and community sessions focused on youth wellbeing and open conversation.

🤝

Community Connection

Social events and meetups designed to build genuine friendships and local networks.

📍

Local & Accessible

All events are based in and around West Melbourne, Docklands, and Footscray.

Upcoming Events

Get Involved

All events are open to teens and young adults. Register via Eventbrite — spots fill fast!

Padel

Padel Open Tournament

Sat 10 May 2025 · 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM

📍 Game4Padel Docklands, 206 Lorimer St

Round-robin Padel tournament open to all levels. Teams of 2. Prizes for top 3 teams. Beginner-friendly — never played before? Join anyway!

$25 / person

Futsal

Futsal 5-a-Side Cup

Sat 24 May 2025 · 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM

📍 Be Active Melbourne, 309 William St, West Melbourne

5-a-side futsal tournament with knockout rounds. Register as a team or as an individual and we'll place you. All genders welcome.

$20 / person
Register →
Mental Health

Let's Talk: Youth Mental Health Workshop

Wed 14 May 2025 · 4:00 PM – 6:30 PM

📍 Phoenix Youth Hub, 72 Buckley St, Footscray

A safe, facilitated space for young people to talk about stress, identity, and mental health. Guest speaker + open discussion. Free snacks provided.

Free
Register →
Social

Community Meetup Night

Fri 30 May 2025 · 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM

📍 Docklands Sports Courts, 68-90 Harbour Esplanade

Casual social night — mix of sports, games, food and vibes. Come alone, bring friends, meet new people. No competition, just connection.

$10 / person

Padel

Beginner Padel Clinic

Sun 8 Jun 2025 · 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM

📍 Recess Padel Club, 17 Rocklea Dr, Port Melbourne

Never picked up a Padel racket? This clinic is for you. 2 hours of coached basics, drills, and fun rallies. Rackets provided.

$30 / person

Schools

In-School Awareness Session

Ongoing — Contact Us

📍 Your School, West Melbourne Area

We come to you. Interactive mental health awareness sessions for Year 9–12 students. Delivered by trained facilitators. Bookings via enquiry form.

Free for schools
